apps.name: Speaker Fix
apps.tagline: Fix your iPhone speaker in one tap
apps.audience: iPhone owners with quiet, muffled, or distorted speaker — especially after water, dust, or drops
apps.problem: Calls are too quiet, music sounds muddy, people ask you to use speakerphone because they can't hear you
features: Instant volume boost without visiting a repair shop

apps.name: Extract Audio from Video
apps.tagline: Convert video to MP3 on iPhone in seconds
apps.audience: iPhone users who want music, voice, or lecture audio from videos without uploading files to the web
apps.problem: Online converters are slow, sketchy, and upload your private videos — you just need an MP3 from a clip on your phone
features: Video to MP3 on device (MP4, MOV)
Share Sheet from Photos or Files
Free core extraction, optional in-app purchases
